CLIENT VOICES

Don't Just Take Our Word For It

4.9 on Google

"

Buzz did such a great job on our curbing. I called him and he was even able to squeeze me in the next day. The curbing gives our yard a much more polished look and I'm so glad we had Buzz come do it because he was fair and did a fantastic job. Highly recommend.

Annie V. Logan

"

Justin and his crew were absolutely amazing! I got quotes from around 7 curbing companies and Justin was by far the friendliest, most responsive, and the fairest pricing. He communicated the whole time and was right on time and went through it with us before starting. He had so much knowledge about what would look good and made recommendations without ever making us feel pressured, but genuinely cared about what would look best. Our yard looks 100% better because of his expertise and perfectionism. We could not recommend him enough!

Morgan C. Logan

"

Justin and his crew were fast and professional. We had general ideas of what we wanted and he was able to quickly help us refine our ideas and suggest changes that really helped our curbs look great!

Adam B. Logan

"

We have used Buzz multiple times and every time they show up on time with a smile ready to get our job done. Their quality is amazing. They are perfectionists. Concrete is a work of art and they know how to do it right. If you want someone who knows what they are doing, you want these guys! Thanks for making our curbing look so good!

Colter L. Logan

"

We really liked working with Buzz! He was great to work with — responded in a timely manner and took pride in his work. We are so happy with how our front yard turned out and will for sure call him when we are ready for curbing in the back. Thanks Buzz!

Heather M. Logan

"

Buzz and crew did a great job on our curbing. Buzz was very responsive to all my questions. He was able to get the job done quickly. Pricing is competitive. Quality of work is fantastic!

Lorinda L. Logan

Typical Install

OUR PHILOSOPHY

Most curbing companies show up, pour a line, and leave. They don't walk the yard with you. They don't ask about your vision.

We design it with you, on your property, the evening before we pour.

Justin walks every job before it starts. No surprises, no cookie-cutter layouts. Your curbing should look like it was designed for your yard — because it was.

See Our Work →

HOW IT WORKS

A Seamless Process

01

Get Your Free Estimate

Call or submit a request. We respond within hours and schedule a time to visit your property — no waiting around for a callback.

02

We Design It On-Site Together

We walk your yard with you, bring 14 color samples and 10 stamp patterns, measure the footage, and design the layout on the spot. You get an exact quote before we leave.

03

Professional Installation & Cleanup

Our crew arrives on time, preps the area, and pours the curbing to your exact specifications. We clean up every scrap of material and walk you through the finished product.

01

Get Your Free Estimate

Call or submit a request. We respond within hours and schedule a time to visit your property — no waiting around for a callback.

02

We Design It On-Site Together

We walk your yard with you, bring 14 color samples and 10 stamp patterns, measure the footage, and design the layout on the spot. You get an exact quote before we leave.

03

Professional Installation & Cleanup

Our crew arrives on time, preps the area, and pours the curbing to your exact specifications. We clean up every scrap of material and walk you through the finished product.

COMMON QUESTIONS

Concrete Curbing Questions from Logan Homeowners

Most residential curbing projects in Logan run between $5 and $8 per linear foot, depending on the style and color you choose. We give exact quotes on-site during the walkthrough — no guessing, no surprises. The estimate is always free.
Most jobs are finished in a single day. We typically pour curbing the morning after your evening estimate. A standard residential yard takes 3–6 hours from start to cleanup.
We serve homeowners across Utah through our three franchise territories: Cache Valley (Logan area), Central (Brigham City to Sandy), and South (Draper to Provo). Check our service areas page for your specific city.
Justin or your local Buzz Co operator comes to your property — usually in the evening when both homeowners can be present. We walk the yard together, talk about what you're envisioning, measure everything on the spot, and give you a firm quote before we leave. No pressure, no follow-up sales calls.
We offer 14 integral colors and 10 stamp patterns. During the on-site estimate, we bring samples so you can see how different colors look against your home's exterior, landscaping rock, and existing concrete. We'll make honest recommendations about what looks best with your setup.
Concrete curbing is built to last. It handles Utah winters, sprinkler systems, and lawn mower contact. Minor hairline cracks can develop over time — that's normal for any concrete — but they don't affect the structure or function. We also offer re-sealing to extend color life.

Still have questions? We're happy to talk.

What Happens After You Reach Out

01

Submit Your Info

Fill out the quick survey or give us a call. We respond to every inquiry — usually within a few hours.

02

On-Site Walkthrough

We schedule a visit so both homeowners can be there. We walk the yard, design the layout together, and quote on the spot.

03

Professional Installation

Our crew handles everything — prep, pour, cleanup. Your yard transformed with zero hassle.
